name: Embystat
tagline: EmbyStat is a web analytics tool, designed to provide insight into website traffic and user behavior.
description:
EmbyStat is a web analytics tool, designed to provide insight into website traffic and user behavior.

Docs: https://github.com/mregni/EmbyStat?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  embystat:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/embystat:latest
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - TZ=Europe/Madrid
    volumes:
      - embystat-config:/config
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://127.0.0.1:6555
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 15
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42029:6555
volumes:
  embystat-config: null
